summary: Offline Mode E2E Testing completed. Fixed critical bug: /api/discounts endpoint was missing - added new endpoint that combines item-discounts and tiered-discounts. All backend APIs for offline caching are working. POS sale flow tested successfully.

minor.issue: Frontend ActivityCenter was calling /api/transfers but backend has /api/stock-transfers - FIXED in ActivityCenter.js

passed_tests: GET /api/items - returns items for offline caching (30 items)
GET /api/variants - returns variants for offline caching
GET /api/customers - returns customers for offline caching (9 customers)
GET /api/stores - returns stores for offline caching (4 stores)
GET /api/vouchers - returns vouchers for offline caching
GET /api/loyalty/settings - returns loyalty settings for offline caching
GET /api/discounts - NEW endpoint returns combined item-discounts and tiered-discounts (6 discounts)
GET /api/item-discounts - returns item-level discounts
GET /api/tiered-discounts - returns tiered discounts
POST /api/sales - creates online sale successfully
POST /api/sales with offline_sale flag - syncs offline sale successfully
GET /api/sales - returns sales list with synced sales
POST /api/vouchers - creates voucher successfully
GET /api/vouchers/validate/{code} - validates voucher and calculates discount
Voucher validation rejects invalid codes (404)
Voucher validation rejects amounts below min_purchase (400)
POS Cache button caches data for offline use
POS add item to cart works
POS checkout modal shows voucher code, discount, payment methods
POS complete sale creates invoice (INV-000018)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Added /api/discounts endpoint to server.py that combines item-discounts and tiered-discounts for offline caching
FIXED: ActivityCenter.js was calling /api/transfers instead of /api/stock-transfers
IndexedDB stores properly configured: pending_sales, cached_items, cached_customers, cached_stores, cached_variants, cached_discounts, cached_vouchers, cached_loyalty
Offline sale sync uses offline_sale flag and offline_id to track offline-created sales
Voucher validation works both online (API call) and offline (cached vouchers)
Loyalty points redemption uses cached loyalty settings when offline
seed_data_creation: Added inventory for SHOES variant (487da179-fe33-4cc7-9370-ba1e77a2ae47) in Main Store for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offline mode backend APIs fully tested and working. Key fix: Added /api/discounts endpoint that was missing. The endpoint combines item-discounts and tiered-discounts with a 'discount_source' field to identify the type. POS flow tested: cache data -> add item -> checkout -> complete sale. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_offline_mode.py with 17 tests. Note: True offline mode testing (simulating network offline) requires browser-level network interception which is limited in automated testing.
limitations_noted: True offline mode testing (network disconnection simulation) requires browser-level network interception
IndexedDB operations are client-side and cannot be directly tested via backend API tests
Offline indicator (red/amber badge) visibility depends on browser online/offline events
